summary: Validated the Buddhavamsa B-line queue and found no actionable documents for draft3_handoff_ready, draft3_requested, draft3_generated, final_scan_done, or final_review. The project has raw source files, but no registered documents, no per-document status JSON, no revision JSON, no draft3 handoff JSON, and no B-line execution logs.

issues.detail: B-line actionable queue size is 0 across draft3_handoff_ready, draft3_requested, draft3_generated, final_scan_done, and final_review.
contents-asset/projects/buddhavamsa/data/documents.json contains an empty documents array while assets/source/raw/ contains 208 markdown source files.
contents-asset/projects/buddhavamsa/data/status/ contains no per-document status JSON files, so no document can be routed to B01, B02, B03, or B04.
contents-asset/projects/buddhavamsa/data/revisions/ contains no revision JSON files required for human review preparation and draft3 handoff validation.
contents-asset/projects/buddhavamsa/handoff/draft3/ contains no draft3 handoff JSON files, so B02/B03/B04 must not start.
outputs/manuscripts/draft3/ and outputs/manuscripts/draft4/ contain no manuscript files beyond placeholders.
No B01/B02/B03/B04 agent-log evidence exists for buddhavamsa.

next_recommended_action: Wait for OLDA-2 to register document doc_ids in data/documents.json and produce the first A-line outputs needed for B-line activation. B-line can start only after, per doc_id, a valid data/status/{doc_id}.json enters draft2_done or later, B01 creates data/revisions/{doc_id}.json and human_review_ready, and human-confirmed handoff/draft3/{doc_id}.json exists before any B02/B03/B04 work.
